title: $132K-$149K: what seed-stage founders pay early employees, based on data - TechCrunch (citing Kruze Consulting)
note: NEW this round. Kruze Consulting payroll analysis of 450+ seed-stage startups: entry-level engineers (SF) $75,000-$105,000; midlevel $90k-$145k depending on region; senior $160k-$235k depending on region.
